meaning: adj.(指牲畜)纯种的、良种的,(指人)高尚的、受过良好教养的n.受过严格训练的人,受过良好教养的人,良种动物
examples: I have only one; but that one is altogether a thoroughbred Lion.
All this suggests that Google's one-trick pony is really more of a thoroughbred.
But this kind of surgery does not have successful example on thoroughbred horses.
Unsurprisingly, many of the organizations focus on equine welfare, particularly Thoroughbred aftercare: rescue, retirement, re-training, re-homing.
But not every thoroughbred that gave their lives to racing has the same happy ending.
